positive: A stylized, central circular emblem featuring whimsical cosmic elements: intertwined crescent moons, blooming nebula flowers, and gracefully spiraling constellations. The aesthetic should be a blend of neo-art nouveau and vaporwave, rendered with clean, thick silhouettes and crisp lines. Use a limited, high-contrast palette of deep midnight blues, electric teal, soft lavender, and glowing gold accents. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical, isolated on a clean white or solid contrasting background, designed for direct apparel printing. Intricate detail, vector illustration quality, high contrast, deep shadows, soft neon glow effect.
negative: blur, noisy, lowres, watermark, text, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, washed out, gradient mess, logos, brands, copyrighted, deep shadows, realism
